name: kimi
description: Unofficial Claude Code plugin that exposes the Kimi (Moonshot) coding model as MCP tools.

kimi_code_api_key.title: Kimi Code API key
kimi_code_api_key.description: Recommended. Kimi Code product API key (from kimi.moonshot.cn). Stored in the system keychain.

moonshot_api_key.title: Moonshot API key (fallback)
moonshot_api_key.description: Alternative. Generic Moonshot platform API key. Used only if Kimi Code key is empty. Stored in the system keychain.
